0: a person raises a brush to their head then moves the brush through their hair repeatedly
2: a person bites food with their teeth then chews it up and down
3: a person raises both hands then brings the palms together to clap
8: a person moves forward with a ball then bounces the ball repeatedly on the ground to dribble
10: a person loses balance then falls down onto the floor
11: a person jumps backward then flips over in a flic flac motion
14: a person bends their knees then pushes off the ground to jump
15: a person leans forward then touches lips to another person for a kiss
20: a person sits on a horse then moves with the horse as it walks or runs
21: two people extend their hands then grasp and shake hands
22: a person raises a bow then pulls back the string and releases an arrow
23: a person lies down on their back then curls the body upward in a situp
26: a person practices with a sword then performs repeated training movements as exercise
27: a person pulls an arm backward then swings it forward to throw an object
